results.title: Don Mattingly has a weird role at this All-Star Game, coaching against his former Blue Jays
results.description: PHILADELHIA (AP) — Don Mattingly felt a tinge of awkwardness when he was offered the chance to serve as a coach under Los Angeles Dodgers manager Dave Roberts at the All-Star Game.
